## Source: amazon-inspector (6385e6085b941d851ce17c44dac94bb93521dad91d75b4d284a3dc8f9d367c2e)
The package @signals-notebook/utils was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (07f61f31b3dae1028ea2fe3d1cebf380485f20cd87ae448f7d59c3b4e716eac1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@signals-notebook/utils' @ 0.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
